title: The Shawshank Redemption
cast: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Godfather
cast: Marlon Brando, Al Pacino, James Caan
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: The Dark Knight
cast: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart
overview: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham City, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological tests of his ability to fight injustice.

title: Pulp Fiction
cast: John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: Schindler's List
cast: Liam Neeson, Ralph Fiennes, Ben Kingsley
overview: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution by the Nazis.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
cast: Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen
overview: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam as they approach Mount Doom with the One Ring.

title: Fight Club
cast: Brad Pitt, Edward Norton, Helena Bonham Carter
overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into an anarchist organization.

title: Forrest Gump
cast: Tom Hanks, Robin Wright, Gary Sinise
overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the events of Vietnam, Watergate, and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

title: Inception
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

title: The Matrix
cast: Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss
overview: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Goodfellas
cast: Ray Liotta, Robert De Niro, Joe Pesci
overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his ups and downs with the mob, his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his mob partners Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito.

title: Interstellar
cast: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
cast: Jodie Foster, Anthony Hopkins, Lawrence A. Bonney
overview: A young F.B.I. cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer.

title: The Lion King
cast: Matthew Broderick, Jeremy Irons, James Earl Jones
overview: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his bitter uncle, who wants to ascend the throne himself.

title: Parasite
cast: Kang-ho Song, Sun-kyun Lee, Yeo-jeong Jo
overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Avengers: Endgame
cast: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, Mark Ruffalo
overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos' actions.

title: Joker
cast: Joaquin Phoenix, Robert De Niro, Zazie Beetz
overview: A socially marginalized clown and aspiring stand-up comedian slowly goes insane and turns to a life of crime in 1980s Gotham City.

title: Whiplash
cast: Miles Teller, J.K. Simmons, Melissa Benoist
overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
cast: Ralph Fiennes, F. Murray Abraham, Mathieu Amalric
overview: A writer encounters the owner of an aging high-class hotel, who tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy in the hotel's glorious years under an exceptional concierge.

title: La La Land
cast: Ryan Gosling, Emma Stone, John Legend
overview: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations for the future.

title: Spirited Away
cast: Daveigh Chase, Suzanne Pleshette, Miyu Irino
overview: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts.

title: Blade Runner 2049
cast: Harrison Ford, Ryan Gosling, Ana de Armas
overview: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former Blade Runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years.

title: Get Out
cast: Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford
overview: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend's parents for the weekend, where his simmering uneasiness about their reception of him eventually reaches a boiling point.

title: Dune
cast: Timothée Chalamet, Rebecca Ferguson, Oscar Isaac
overview: Feature film adaptation of Frank Herbert's science fiction novel about the son of a noble family entrusted with the protection of the most valuable asset and most vital element in the galaxy.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
cast: Michelle Yeoh, Stephanie Hsu, Jamie Lee Curtis
overview: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant is swept up into an insane adventure in which she alone can save existence by exploring other universes connecting with the lives she could have led.

title: No Country for Old Men
cast: Tommy Lee Jones, Javier Bardem, Josh Brolin
overview: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.

title: There Will Be Blood
cast: Daniel Day-Lewis, Paul Dano, Eli Sunday
overview: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil and madness, focusing on a turn-of-the-century prospector in the early days of the Texas oil boom.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
cast: Tom Hardy, Charlize Theron, Nicholas Hoult
overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

title: Her
cast: Joaquin Phoenix, Amy Adams, Scarlett Johansson
overview: In a near future, a lonely writer develops an unlikely relationship with an operating system designed to meet his every need.

title: 12 Angry Men
cast: Henry Fonda, Lee J. Cobb, Martin Balsam
overview: The jury in a New York City murder trial is frustrated by a single member whose skeptical caution forces them to more carefully consider the evidence before jumping to a hasty verdict.

title: Oppenheimer
cast: Cillian Murphy, Emily Blunt, Matt Damon
overview: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

title: Barbie
cast: Margot Robbie, Ryan Gosling, America Ferrera
overview: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

title: Killers of the Flower Moon
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Robert De Niro, Lily Gladstone
overview: Members of the Osage Nation are murdered under mysterious circumstances in the 1920s sparking a major F.B.I. investigation involving J. Edgar Hoover.

title: Poor Things
cast: Emma Stone, Mark Ruffalo, Willem Dafoe
overview: The incredible tale about the fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter, a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox scientist Dr. Godwin Baxter.

title: Alien
cast: Sigourney Weaver, Tom Skerritt, John Hurt
overview: After a space merchant vessel receives an unknown transmission as a distress call, one of the crew is attacked by a mysterious life form and they soon realize that its life cycle has merely begun.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
cast: Keir Dullea, Gary Lockwood, William Sylvester
overview: After discovering a mysterious artifact buried beneath the Lunar surface, mankind sets off on a quest to find its origins with help from intelligent supercomputer H.A.L. 9000.

title: Taxi Driver
cast: Robert De Niro, Jodie Foster, Cybill Shepherd
overview: A mentally unstable veteran works as a nighttime taxi driver in New York City, where the perceived decadence and sleaze fuels his urge to violently clean up the city.

title: A Beautiful Mind
cast: Russell Crowe, Ed Harris, Jennifer Connelly
overview: After John Nash, a brilliant but asocial mathematician, accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish.

title: Back to the Future
cast: Michael J. Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson
overview: Marty McFly, a 17-year-old high school student, is accidentally sent 30 years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean invented by his close friend, the eccentric scientist Doc Brown.

title: The Departed
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Matt Damon, Jack Nicholson
overview: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.

title: City of God
cast: Alexandre Rodrigues, Leandro Firmino, Phellipe Haagensen
overview: In the slums of Rio, two kids' paths diverge as one struggles to become a photographer and the other a kingpin.

title: Amélie
cast: Audrey Tautou, Mathieu Kassovitz, Rufus
overview: Amélie is an innocent and naive girl in Paris with her own sense of justice, decides to help those around her and along the way, discovers love.

title: Oldboy
cast: Choi Min-sik, Yoo Ji-tae, Kang Hye-jeong
overview: After being imprisoned for 15 years without explanation, a man is released and given money, a cellphone, and five days to find his captor.

title: Princess Mononoke
cast: Billy Crudup, Claire Danes, Minnie Driver
overview: On a journey to find the cure for a Tatarigami's curse, Ashitaka finds himself in the middle of a war between the forest gods and Tatara, a mining colony.

title: The Truman Show
cast: Jim Carrey, Ed Harris, Laura Linney
overview: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
cast: Jim Carrey, Kate Winslet, Tom Wilkinson
overview: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories.

title: The Social Network
cast: Jesse Eisenberg, Andrew Garfield, Justin Timberlake
overview: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claim he stole their idea, and his co-founder who was later squeezed out of the business.

title: Django Unchained
cast: Jamie Foxx, Christoph Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio
overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

title: The Prestige
cast: Christian Bale, Hugh Jackman, Scarlett Johansson
overview: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have to outwit each other.

title: Memento
cast: Guy Pearce, Carrie-Anne Moss, Joe Pantoliano
overview: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer.
